steps.title: Set up the equation from the word problem
steps.content: The positive number is $x$. The number that is 8 more than $x$ is $x + 8$. Their product is 180.

steps.title: Test the answer choices
steps.content: Backsolving $x=18$: If $x = 18$, then $x + 8 = 26$, and $18 \times 26 = 468 \neq 180$. Fails. Testing $x=10$: If $x = 10$, then $x + 8 = 18$, and $10 \times 18 = 180$. B is correct.
